brief: A food brand exploring a new product wants a market research memo on the plant-based protein market. It must cover the total market size, name two key customer segments, identify the dominant distribution channel, and give a clear entry recommendation with rationale. Budget is $450.
reference: A strong memo states the plant-based protein market size, names two customer segments (e.g. flexitarians, athletes), identifies the dominant distribution channel (e.g. grocery retail), and gives a specific entry recommendation with rationale. It must not promise guaranteed market share, provide nutritional certification, or offer supply chain setup.
